passive.name: Mana Surge
passive.description: Xerath's basic attacks periodically restore Mana. Whenever Xerath kills a unit, this cooldown is reduced.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, {{cis|Xerath}} next basic attack restores {{sti|{{as|mana}}}}, doubled against an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Xerath''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] to restore {{sti|mana|{{pp|30;33;36;42;48;54;63;72;81;90;102;114;126;138;150;165;180;195|formula=27 + 3 at each level up to 3, then + 6 at each level up to 6, then + 9 at each level up to 10, 12 at each level up to 15, then + 15 at each level|color=mana}} {{as|mana}}}}, doubled to {{pp|60;66;72;84;96;108;126;144;162;180;204;228;252;276;300;330;360;390|formula=54 + 6 at each level up to 3, then + 12 at each level up to 6, then + 18 at each level up to 10, then + 24 at each level up to 15, then + 30 at each level|color=mana}} against enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Mana Surge's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced by {{fd|2.5}} seconds whenever '''Xerath''' kills an enemy.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Mana Surge does not trigger if '''Xerath''' would restore above {{as|his '''maximum''' mana}}.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Mana Surge'' triggers against structures.
* ''Mana Surge'' will trigger even if the attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]].
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Mana Surge's '' interactions with {{tip|dodge|dodging}}, and {{tip|blind|blinding}} effects.

Q.name: Arcanopulse
Q.description: Fires a long-range beam of energy, dealing magic damage to all targets hit.
Q.tooltip:
Begin Charging: Xerath begins charging an arcane beam, Slowing himself gradually up to 50%. 

Release: Xerath fires the beam, dealing {{ tooltiptotaldamage }} magic damage. The range increases with time charged.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xerath}} {{tip|channel|charges}} up to a short time, increasing the {{sti|range}} of his beam.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Arcanopulse'' can be recast within the duration and will cancel automatically afterwards, refunding half the {{sti|mana|{{as|mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} After a brief delay, '''Xerath'''  fires a beam of energy in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xerath''' {{tip|channel|charges}} while being {{tip|slow|slowed}} by {{pp|key=%|type=channel time|0;10;15;20;25;30;35;40|0 to 1.75|formula=10% after 0 to 0.25 seconds, then {{plus}}5% per 0.25 seconds channeled, capped at 40%}} for up to 3 seconds to increase ''Arcanopulse's'' {{sti|range}} over the first {{fd|1.5}} to {{fd|1.75}} seconds of the channel.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Arcanopulse'' can be recast within the duration. If the charge is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} or completes without reactivation, ''Arcanopulse'' is cancelled and refunds {{sti|mana|{{as|half the mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Xerath''' becomes {{tip|lockout|unable to act}} for {{rutngt|0.5}} and afterwards fires a beam of energy in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{pp|type=channel time|700 to 1450 for 8|0 to 1.75|formula=735 {{plus}} 107.14 per 0.25 seconds (after an intial delay of 0 to 0.25). ''This is capped at 1450 range.''}}

W.name: Eye of Destruction
W.description: Calls down a barrage of arcane energy, slowing and dealing magic damage to all enemies in an area. Targets in the middle receive additional damage and a stronger slow.
W.tooltip: Xerath calls down a blast of arcane energy, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slowing them by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. Enemies in the center take {{ sweetspottotaldamage }} magic damage instead and are Slowed by {{ sweetspotslowamount*100 }}%, decaying over {{ slowduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xerath}} casts down a blast of energy that strikes the target location after a brief delay, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit. The effects are increased against enemies in the epicenter.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xerath''' casts down a blast of arcane energy that strikes the target location after {{rutngt|0.5}}, briefly granting {{tip|sight}} of the area and dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 25% for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies in the epicenter take {{fd|66.7}}% increased damage and are {{tip|slow|slowed}} by a greater amount, decaying to 25% over the duration.

E.name: Shocking Orb
E.description: Deals magic damage to an enemy and stuns them.
E.tooltip: Xerath fires an orb of raw magic, Stunning the first enemy hit for up to {{ maxstunduration }} seconds based on distance travelled, and dealing {{ tooltiptotaldamage }} magic damage. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xerath}} fires an orb of energy in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, {{tip|stun|stunning}} them based on travel distance.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xerath''' fires an orb of energy in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|stuns}} them for {{pp|type=orb travel distance|0.75 to 2.25 for 11|0 to 1050|formula=0.75+(0.15 per 105 units). ''This is capped at 1050 units traveled.''}} seconds.

R.name: Rite of the Arcane
R.description: Xerath immobilizes himself and gains numerous long-range barrages.
R.tooltip:
Xerath ascends to his true form and channels for {{ e1 }} seconds. During this time he may Recast up to {{ e2 }} times.

Recast: Xerath launches a magical artillery, dealing {{ tooltiptotaldamage }} magic damage. For each champion hit, the artillery deals an additional {{ rampdamagecalc }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xerath}} {{tip|channel|channels}} up to a period, being able to fire several arcane missiles across the surrounding area.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If ''Rite of the Arcane'' ends without using any recasts, half of the cooldown is {{sti|cdr|refunded}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast - Arcane Barrage:}} '''Xerath''' catapults an arcane missile to the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. Hitting enemy champions increases the damage of the following missiles, up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb4: ''Rite of the Arcane's'' range is always {{tip|obscured|visible}}. '''Xerath''' will {{tip|sight|reveal}} himself if a missile lands near an enemy.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xerath''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to 10 seconds, gaining the ability to recast ''Rite of the Arcane'' multiple times after {{fd|0.5}} seconds within the duration. If ''Rite of the Arcane'' ends without any of the recasts being used, half of its {{sti|cooldown}} is refunded.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast - Arcane Barrage:}} '''Xerath''' catapults an arcane missile that strikes the target location after a {{rutngt|0.6}} delay, briefly granting {{tip|sight}} of the area and dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. Each cast has a {{tt|static cooldown|Unaffected by ability haste}} of {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|180 to 280}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|(180 to 280)*(4 to 6)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|40*4 to 40*6}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Hitting at least one enemy champion grants a stack of ''Arcane Perfection'' during the channel, stacking up to a maximum amount. Each stack increases ''Arcane Barrage's'' damage.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Maximum Stacks|{{ap|3 to 5}}}}
{{st|Increased Damage per Stack|{{ap|20 to 30 3}} {{as|(+ 5% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: '''Xerath''' will {{tip|sight|reveal}} himself if a missile strikes near an enemy.
wiki_detail.description5: ''Rite of the Arcane's recast will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Each cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* ''Arcane Barrage'' will not apply its increased damage per stack to the cast that granted the stack.
** Only successive casts of the ability will benefit from the damage increase.
* A circular indicator will be displayed at the target location to signify that the area will be blasted.
* A circle indicating the ability's maximum range forms on the map over 1 second (starting small and rapidly expanding to the maximum range over the delay) for the channel's duration.
** The maximum-range indicator is visible to both allies and enemies and is color coded for friendly (blue) or hostile (red).
* ''Rite of the Arcane'' uses a [[Champion ability|barrage system]] so that it can be recast multiple times within a given period at no additional cost.
* '''Xerath''' will turn to face toward the direction of the target location after using a recast.
* '''Xerath''' gains a wider field of view during ''Rite of the Arcane''.
* '''Xerath''' can use {{ai|Dark Passage|Thresh}} while channeling.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Xerath''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
** {{si|Teleport}} and {{si|Recall}} are disabled for the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds and otherwise interrupt the channel if they are used.
{{ct|channel|cast=false|attack=interrupts|move=Disabled for the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds, otherwise, interrupts.|items=interrupts,true,,false|spells=true, false, interrupts, interrupts, false}}
